column1: # /Data Query — full database mode (Input + Criteria + Output and
#   Input range A1..C5 — header row (name/region/age) + 4 records.
#   Criteria range E1..F2 — match records where region=east.
# ---- Criteria range header (E1..F1) and one criterion row (E2..F2).
# O = Output → POINT H1..J4 (header + space for 3 matches).
# E = Extract → matching records appear at H2..J4.
# Matches: alice/east/30, carol/east/40, dave/east/35 (in input order).
# ---- Find — pointer jumps to the first matching input record (alice/A2).
# ---- Del — drop matching records (alice, carol, dave); only bob remains.
# After Del, the input range still has its header at row 1 and only
# bob's record at row 2; rows 3..5 are blank.
